dj_text: You're listening to That Pirate Bot DJ. Let's keep it going. ERROR! Unknown was too good. Replacing with I'm Into Something Good - Herman's Hermits [Bardcore | Medieval version]! Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: {dadys_home}, everyone! It's time to level up your music game with our latest release, **Galactic Beats Discs**!
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: I'm Into Something Good - Herman's Hermits [Bardcore | Medieval version]
